ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-11-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-11-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Continued To Apr-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any party, counsel, or interested person.

Noting the absence of the personal representative, Ms. Mendoza, and her counsel, Mr. Nuris, noting the posture of the case, the failure to file an Inventory and Appraisal, and the want of prosecution to close the estate, the Court orders the Executor, Janet P. Mendoza, and her attorney, Thomas A. Nuris, to appear on April 11, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. and explain their failure to appear at this hearing and their failure to administer the estate in a timely manner, specifically: file the required Inventory and Appraisal and/or file a Petition to close the Estate. Neither the executor nor her counsel need appear on April 11, 2017 if the required pleadings are filed on or before April 6, 2017.

Judge: Hon. Peter J. Busch; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Jaime; Not reported.
